title: Alt40k Supplement v1.0
description: Subfaction-specific supplement: unique units and wargear merged into the parent faction at load time. Unit and Weapon types are imported by $ref from the main faction schema — no duplication.

subfaction.description: Must match a subfaction.id in the parent faction JSON. Applied as chapterRestriction on all units at load time.

commonWargear.description: Weapons unique to this supplement. To use a weapon already defined in the parent faction, reference it by ID — do not redeclare it here.

units.description: Units exclusive to this subfaction. chapterRestriction is applied automatically by the app at load time; do not set it in the source JSON.
